---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for R.K. SkillForges
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem.  
Ex. *I'm always frustrated when I can't filter courses by category.*

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Which Part of the Project Does This Affect?

- [ ] Frontend (React UI)
- [ ] Backend (FastAPI / MongoDB)
- [ ] Infrastructure (Docker / Terraform / AWS)
- [ ] CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Add any screenshots, mockups, or references that help explain the feature.
